releaseNotes.zh-CN:
DataWhere 1.2.7

新功能
- 续期流程优化：续期时自动选中当前等级套餐，有效期从当前到期日延长
- 许可证新增生效时间(validFrom)字段
- 导入导出支持团队配置包（含环境、数据源模板）

优化
- 数据源创建不再阻塞，保存后立即显示，连接测试和同步在后台进行
- 去掉按数据源类型的实例数限制，只保留总数限制
- 修复表单提交后页面闪烁问题
releaseNotes.en-US:
DataWhere 1.2.7

New Features
- Optimized renewal flow: auto-select current tier plan, expiry extends from current end date
- Added validFrom field for license effective start time
- Import/export now supports team config bundles (environments + datasource templates)

Improvements
- Datasource creation no longer blocks: save first, connection test and sync run in background
- Removed per-type instance limits, only total count limit remains
- Fixed form submission page flash issue
